question: What are the names of clubs that have players who have won more than twice?
sql: SELECT club.Name FROM club JOIN player ON club.Club_ID = player.Club_ID WHERE player.Wins_count > 2 GROUP BY club.Club_ID HAVING COUNT(player.Player_ID) > 0

semantic.reason: 过滤条件应针对player表的wins_count字段，且需通过JOIN关联club和player表，但反向翻译描述中未体现关联关系，且可能缺少GROUP BY和HAVING子句来确保俱乐部有至少一个符合条件的球员
